properties.script: This island is where people who are exiled from the close towns are forced to go.. and die.
Who plants corn in lines? these should definitlly be in maze shape.
Best be careful not to step on the farmers crops!
Not much going on in the small village of East Vanaheimr, just a couple shops and farms.
For the locals of the village, this is the only land passage to the outside world, but it is infested with dangerous animals.

DANGER AHEAD
Beware of animals in the lowlands.

NORTH:
Vanahemir Lowlands, level 15 recommended

EAST:
The Damp Caves, level 6 recommended

SOUTH-EAST:
The Farmer's Crops, level 1 recommended

83.script: This damp cave reaks with mold, Why would anyone want to use this as a storage area?
